From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

(Redirected from [National Register (disambiguation)](/w/index.php?title=National_Register_(disambiguation)&redirect=no "National Register (disambiguation)"))

**National Register** may refer to:

* [National Register of Historic Places](/wiki/National_Register_of_Historic_Places "National Register of Historic Places")
* [Canadian Register of Historic Places](/wiki/Canadian_Register_of_Historic_Places "Canadian Register of Historic Places")
* [National Driver Register](/wiki/National_Driver_Register "National Driver Register"), United States
* [National Register (Belgium)](/wiki/National_Register_(Belgium) "National Register (Belgium)")
* [National Register of Electors](/wiki/National_Register_of_Electors "National Register of Electors"), Canada
* [National Register of Citizens](/wiki/National_Register_of_Citizens "National Register of Citizens"), India
* [National Court Register](/wiki/National_Court_Register "National Court Register"), Poland
* [National Register of Champion Trees](/wiki/National_Register_of_Champion_Trees "National Register of Champion Trees")
* [National Women's Register](/wiki/National_Women%27s_Register "National Women's Register"), Australia
* ['National' or 'population' registers](/wiki/Civil_registration "Civil registration")
